description_long: This plant pot features a polygonal, faceted design with a deep, open cavity suitable for holding soil and a plant. The exterior is a dark, matte brown, giving it a modern and understated appearance. The pot has straight, angular sides that taper slightly towards the base, providing stability and a contemporary look. The interior appears spacious enough for a small to medium plant, and there are subtle speckles or color variations visible inside, possibly representing soil or decorative stones. The rim is flat and even, with no visible handles or embellishments. The overall construction suggests it is made from a sturdy, hard material, likely ceramic or concrete.
description: A dark, faceted plant pot with a deep, open cavity and a modern, angular design. The surface is matte and unadorned, suitable for small to medium plants.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open cavity and the faceted, angular front edge of the pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, straight profile and the depth of the pot.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat back and the uniform height of the rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the left, showing the same straight, angular profile.
attribute_placement_context: ideal for modern urban patios or sidewalk cafes
